phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'inizio del Sentiero Azzurro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lin-EE-tsyoh del sen-TYEH-roh ad-DZOOR-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Dietro la stazione, seguire le indicazioni.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-EHT-roh LAH stah-tsee-OH-neh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
likely_response.translation_en: Behind the station, follow the signs.

responses.english: Behind the station, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: dee-EHT-roh LAH stah-tsee-OH-neh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee
responses.local: Dietro la stazione, seguire le indicazioni.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiude il sentiero due?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah kay OR-ah KYOO-day eel sen-TYEH-ro DOO-ay

likely_response.local: Chiude al tramonto, circa alle diciotto.
likely_response.pronunciation: kee-OO-deh AHL trah-MOHN-toh CHEER-kah AHL-leh dee-chee-OHT-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Closes at sunset, around six pm.

responses.english: Closes at sunset, around six pm.
responses.phonetic: kee-OO-deh AHL trah-MOHN-toh CHEER-kah AHL-leh dee-chee-OHT-toh
responses.local: Chiude al tramonto, circa alle diciotto.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si valida la Cinque Terre Card, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-veh see VAH-lee-da la CHEEN-kweh TER-reh card, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Alle colonnine gialle prima di salire.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL-leh koh-lohn-NEE-neh jee-AHL-leh PREE-mah DEE sah-LEE-reh
likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow pillars before boarding.

responses.english: At the yellow pillars before boarding.
responses.phonetic: AHL-leh koh-lohn-NEE-neh jee-AHL-leh PREE-mah DEE sah-LEE-reh
responses.local: Alle colonnine gialle prima di salire.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il pass per i sentieri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta il pass per ee sen-TYEH-ree, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.
